name: arfm
description: Agent-Readable File Manager (ARFM): bimodal markdown + JSON-LD with block-level IDs, Yjs collaboration, and MCP tools.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @arfm/server & npm run dev --workspace @arfm/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @arfm/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @arfm/server
